title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies used by Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days with Claude Code: role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tool building, and pre-planning. Marchese identifies one strategy as particularly effective and another as controversial based on Tan's public approach.
